mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbound_message ( session_key, source, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionKey}, #{source}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_key, source, content, status, msg_type, created_at FROM tgai.inbound_message WHERE session_key = #{sessionKey} AND source = 'web' ORDER BY create_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
